pr.title: Match 22 functions across stage, fighter, menu, match-end, and synth TUs
pr.author: davidfeira

summary: Large multi-TU decomp matching PR: the body enumerated 22 matched functions across stage, fighter, menu/scene, match-end/game-mode, and SysDolphin synth code, with typed header refinements and minimal local struct layouts needed for codegen. decomp.dev reported +9608 matched code bytes (+0.25%) and +8 matched data bytes; its 25 new-match count also included extra counted items such as fn_801F77B0, ftKb_SpecialN_800F1D24, and data. The reusable pattern is careful ABI/type cleanup plus local layout declarations, objdiff validation, and explicit avoidance of adjacent fuzzy regressions.
key_files: src/melee/gr/granime.c — matched grAnime_801C8138 stage animation archive/JObj anim binder.

src/melee/gr/gricemt.c and src/melee/gr/gricemt.h — matched Ice Mountain scroll/anime functions grIceMt_801F7A2C, grIceMt_801F929C, grIceMt_801FA364 and improved fn_801F77B0; typed grIceMt_801FA364 as bool with state/out/callback args.
src/melee/gr/grhomerun.c and src/melee/gr/grhomerun.h — matched grHomeRun_8021C914 stage initializer and grHomeRun_8021EC58 HSD_Text score readout; refined HSD_Text* return and u32 score arg.
src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_Init.c and ftKb_Init.h — matched ftKb_SpecialN_800F1DAC collision impact effect and changed caller ftKb_SpecialN_800F1D24 to pass HSD_GObj*.
src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN.c — matched ftKb_SpecialLw_Coll and ftKb_SpecialLwEnd_Coll using file-local ftKb_Init_803CB490_layout.
src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNYs.c — matched static fn_8010AA64 Yoshi-egg shrink/accessory scale callback.
src/melee/mn/mndatadel.c and mndatadel.h — matched mnDataDel_8024EBC8 warning dialog text/background animation setter and fn_8024F1D4 input handler.
src/melee/mn/mnmainrule.c and mnmainrule.h — matched mn_80230D18 match-rule snapshot collector with local mn_80230D18_t and typed prototype.
src/melee/vi/vi1101.c and vi1101.h — matched un_8031F294 Mushroom-Kingdom-Route demo setup with typed char_index/costume_index args and static scene/player data.
src/melee/gm/gm_1601.c and gm_1601.h — matched fn_80161004, fn_80162068, fn_801661E0; added partial fn_80169F50 improvement; typed MatchEnd/fn_80161C90 prototypes.
src/melee/gm/gm_1BA8.c — matched gm_801BAB40 tournament-event PlayerInitData projector and gm_801BD46C end-of-round arbiter.
src/sysdolphin/baselib/synth.c and synth.static.h — matched HSD_Synth_8038B120 and HSD_SynthPStreamHeaderCallback; refined lbl_804C4540/lbl_804C4524 static data layout.
what_changed: Replaced stubs/partials with matched C for stage functions: grAnime_801C8138, grIceMt_801F7A2C, grIceMt_801F929C, grIceMt_801FA364, grHomeRun_8021C914, grHomeRun_8021EC58, and the partially matched fn_801F77B0.

Added fighter matches for held-item throw effects, Kirby Special-N/Special-Lw collision handling, and Kirby/Yoshi egg accessory scaling: fn_800D84D4, ftKb_SpecialN_800F1DAC, ftKb_SpecialLw_Coll, ftKb_SpecialLwEnd_Coll, fn_8010AA64.
Added menu/scene matches for data-delete warning dialog animation/input, main-rule snapshot collection, and un_8031F294 demo-character setup.

Added game-mode/match-end matches for largest-loser reduction, persistent KO accumulation with 0xFFFF saturation, team tiebreaker small-loser ordering, tournament event slot initialization, and tournament event end arbitration.

Added SysDolphin synth matches for SFX-bank stream-prefetch finalization and prefetched-stream header handling, including AX voice setup, volume/update queueing, and follow-up HSD_DevComRequest scheduling.
Refined public/static headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS/speculative types to typed signatures in gricemt.h, mnmainrule.h, vi1101.h, ftKb_Init.h, gm_1601.h, grhomerun.h, mndatadel.h, and synth.static.h.
Introduced minimal local layout structs for matching instead of over-declaring unknown data: ftKb_Init_803CB490_layout, grIceMt_FA364_State, gm_801BAB40_src, and mn_80230D18_t.
Verification in the PR body reported ninja producing build-linux/GALE01/main.dol OK and per-function objdiff-cli 100.0% for each of the 22 named functions.
smart_moves: Used typed prototypes as part of the match, not just cleanup: ftKb_SpecialN_800F1DAC(HSD_GObj*), grIceMt_801FA364 returning bool, MatchEnd* signatures in gm_1601.h, HSD_Text* grHomeRun_8021EC58(u32), and typed un_8031F294 args all encode ABI facts future callers can reuse.

Kept unknown global layouts minimal and local, especially struct ftKb_Init_803CB490_layout { char pad[0x74]; Vec3 vec; }, which allowed correct loads without pretending the full global was understood.

Preserved MWCC-friendly code shape instead of refactoring: repeated GET_FIGHTER temporaries, repeated Vec3 slot resets in Kirby Special-Lw, explicit branchy saturation logic, casts through s16/f32 arrays, and PAD_STACK annotations.
Handled count/verification honestly: the PR body says 22 named function matches, while decomp.dev counted 25 new match items including extra partial/data matches.

Caught and resolved an adjacent fuzzy regression before merge: a cherry-picked dont_inline pragma around ftCo_CaptureWaitLw_Phys initially regressed fn_800DAD18 from 100% to 90.31%; removing it restored fn_800DAD18 to 100%.
Grouped many unrelated TUs in one PR but made it reviewable by documenting each function’s behavior, affected headers, and objdiff/ninja verification.
decomp_lessons: When a matched body proves a signature, update the header immediately; this PR shows several UNK_PARAMS removals that also improved caller matches.
Minimal file-local structs are a safe bridge for unknown assets/data blobs: name the layout after the global or function address and declare only the fields needed for codegen.
Do not DRY up repeated initialization patterns if the original compiler emitted repeated stores; Kirby Special-Lw’s five Vec3 slot resets and eight scratch zeros were intentionally left explicit.
Function matching can change data matching and adjacent function scores; consult decomp.dev/objdiff for both new matches and regressions, not just the target function list.
For HSD/JObj animation matches, preserve archive lookup, child-JObj selection, parallel joint/material/shape anim binding, flag-table behavior, and first-frame priming order.

For audio/synth callbacks, order matters: voice acquisition, AX address/ADPCM/src/VE setup, global round-robin indices, interrupt-protected update queue insertion, and pending-flag clearing all affect matching and behavior.
naming_conventions: Unidentified functions kept address-based fn_ names: fn_800D84D4, fn_8010AA64, fn_8024F1D4, fn_80161004, fn_80162068, fn_801661E0, fn_80169F50.
Subsystem-known functions used project prefixes: grAnime_, grIceMt_, grHomeRun_, ftKb_SpecialN_, ftKb_SpecialLw_, mnDataDel_, mn_, gm_, un_, HSD_Synth_.
Local layout/helper structs were named after the global/function they model: ftKb_Init_803CB490_layout, grIceMt_FA364_State, gm_801BAB40_src, mn_80230D18_t.
Headers retained address comments beside prototypes, e.g. /* 1FA364 */, /* 230D18 */, /* 31F294 */, matching existing project convention.
Typed aliases followed existing decomp style: Fighter_GObj*, Ground_GObj*, HSD_GObj*, HSD_JObj*, HSD_Text*, MatchEnd*, PlayerInitData*, Vec3, s32/u8/u16/f32/bool.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK with small explicit sizes to reproduce stack frames in fighter, game-mode, gricemt, and synth functions.
Matched unknown data access with casts and offsets, including char pad[0x74]+Vec3 for ftKb_Init_803CB490 and s16/f32 indexing into grIm_804D69F4.

Preserved exact constants and masks: Kirby collision env_flags/prev_env_flags masks, effects 0x430/0x405/0x49E, SFX 0xFC/0xFF/0x100/0x101, All-Star mode 0x1B, stock/event constants, and KO saturation at 0xFFFF.
Used compact packed source structs for data projection, especially gm_801BAB40_src with byte flags unpacked into PlayerInitData bitfields by shifts.
Kept assert strings/line-sensitive structure where present, such as grAnime_801C8138 archive assertion and gricemt mgobj/jobj assertions.
Adjusted synth.static.h data layout by splitting lbl_804C4540 into x0/x4/pad and adding lbl_804C4524, which helped the synth matches and static data layout.
review_feedback: No human review comments or formal reviews were captured in the slice; reviewer intent beyond merge is weak evidence.
The only captured PR comment was decomp-dev[bot], reporting matched code 66.21% (+0.25%, +9608 bytes) and matched data 38.70% (+8 bytes).
decomp.dev reported 25 new match items, 7 improvements in unmatched items, and 1 unmatched data regression in main/melee/gr/gricemt .sdata2 (-9 bytes, 62.12% to 50.00%).
PR body notes the initial fuzzy regression for fn_800DAD18 caused by a dont_inline pragma cherry-picked with a partial ftCo_CaptureWaitLw_Phys match; removing the pragma restored fn_800DAD18 to 100%.
Squash/auto-merge metadata included a separate 'Run clang-format' commit before merge.
follow_up_queries: Find PRs that replace UNK_PARAMS with typed prototypes to unlock function matches.
Find PRs that use minimal file-local layout structs for unknown globals or asset blobs.
Find Ice Mountain gricemt matches involving grIceMt_801FA364 state machine or grIm_804D69F4 offset casts.
Find Kirby Special-Lw matches using ftKb_Init_803CB490_layout and repeated Vec3 reset patterns.
Find SysDolphin synth stream-prefetch matches involving HSD_SynthPStreamHeaderCallback, AX voices, or HSD_DevComRequest.
Find PRs where decomp.dev reported more match items than the PR title because partial/data items became 100%.
Find PRs that fixed adjacent fuzzy regressions by removing dont_inline or other codegen pragmas.
